name: dns_query_win_domain_azurewebsites
raw_query: any where dns.question.name:"*azurewebsites.net" and (not ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe")) or (process.executable:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeWebView\\Application\\*" or process.executable:"*\\WindowsApps\\MicrosoftEdge.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"))) or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*")) and (process.executable like~ ("*\\msedge.exe", "*\\msedgewebview2.exe"))) or process.executable:"*\\safari.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("*\\MsMpEng.exe", "*\\MsSense.exe")) or (process.executable:"*\\brave.exe" and process.executable:"C:\\Program Files\\BraveSoftware\\*") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Maxthon\\*" and process.executable:"*\\maxthon.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Opera\\*" and process.executable:"*\\opera.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\SeaMonkey\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SeaMonkey\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\seamonkey.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Vivaldi\\*" and process.executable:"*\\vivaldi.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Naver\\Naver Whale\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Naver\\Naver Whale\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\whale.exe") or process.executable:"*\\Tor Browser\\*" or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Waterfox\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Waterfox\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\Waterfox.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\midori-ng\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Midori Next Generation.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\SlimBrowser\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SlimBrowser\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\slimbrowser.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Flock\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Flock.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Phoebe\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Phoebe.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Falkon\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Falkon\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\falkon.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Avant Browser\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Avant Browser\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\avant.exe")))
